game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Be the leader of wobblers from ancient lands, spooky places, and fantasy worlds. Watch them fight in simulations made with the wobbliest physics system ever created, make your own wobblers in the unit creator and send your army off to fight your friends in multiplayer.

Be the leader of red and blue wobblers from ancient lands, spooky places, and fantasy worlds. Watch them fight in simulations made with the wobbliest physics system ever created.

When you grow tired of the 100+ wobblers at your disposal you can make new ones in the unit creator.

You can also send wobblers to fight your friends or strangers in online multiplayer!

Features:

  • Campaigns
  • Multiplayer
  • Workshop
  • Unit, map and faction Creator
  • Campaign and battle creator
  • Sandbox mode
  • Unit Possession
  • A bunch of silly units

Custom content and workshop:

  • Unit and faction Creator
  • Campaign and battle creator
  • In-game workshop
game_info.description: Command your wobbly army in epic physics-based battles! Deploy red wobblers to fight against invading blue enemies across progressively challenging waves. Your wobblers use realistic ragdoll physics and fight automatically once spawned. Survive all waves to achieve victory, but if enemies break through your defenses, it's game over. Strategic unit placement and timing are key to victory!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move spawn cursor left/right across your deployment zone
Space: Deploy a wobbler at the cursor position (costs points)
Shift: Deploy a stronger wobbler (costs more points)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Escape: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to title screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and spawning test. Validates that the spawn cursor moves correctly and that wobblers can be deployed at different positions. Tests the fundamental mechanics of unit creation.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the cursor left and right across the spawn zone. Spawn basic units at various positions to test the spawning mechanic. Alternate between left and right positions to ensure coverage.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The cursor moves smoothly in response to arrow key inputs. Wobblers spawn at the cursor position when space is pressed. Position changes are reflected in gameState. Test succeeds when multiple units are spawned successfully.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Implements an optimal strategy to defeat all enemy waves and achieve victory. Tests combat mechanics, unit effectiveness, and game progression through all waves.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Deploy a balanced mix of basic and strong wobblers strategically. Space units evenly across the spawn zone to create a defensive line. Prioritize strong units when points allow. Maintain continuous spawning to overwhelm enemy forces.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defeat all enemy waves by maintaining a strong defensive line. Reach GAME_OVER_WIN state after the final wave is defeated. Score and wave progression tracked correctly throughout the game.
